    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AutosaveSnapshot
     
    AutosaveSnapshotDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for AutosaveSnapshot entity.
    DatabaseModule
    Provides Hilt dependency injection configuration for Room database and DAOs.
    DrawingCanvasFragment
     
    ExportHistory
     
    ExportHistoryDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for ExportHistory entity.
    Layer
     
    LayerDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for Layer entity.
    LocalDatabase
    Room database for the Pixel Create application.
    LocalDatabase.Converters
    Type converters for Room database.
    LoginFragment
    Fragment for handling Google Sign In authentication.
    MainActivity
    Main activity for the Pixel Create application.
    Palette
     
    PaletteColor
     
    PaletteColorDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for PaletteColor entity.
    PaletteDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for Palette entity.
    PaletteManagementFragment
    Fragment for managing color palettes.
    PaletteRepository
    Repository interface for Palette entity operations.
    PaletteRepositoryImpl
    Implementation of PaletteRepository providing palette data operations.
    Pixel
     
    PixelCreateApplication
    Initializes (in the PixelCreateApplication.onCreate() method) application-level resources that cannot be handled with Hilt dependency injection.
    PixelDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for Pixel entity.
    Project
     
    ProjectDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for Project entity.
    ProjectGalleryFragment
    Fragment displaying the user's project gallery.
    ProjectRepository
    Repository interface for Project entity operations.
    ProjectRepositoryImpl
    Implementation of ProjectRepository providing project data operations.
    RepositoryModule
    Provides Hilt dependency injection configuration for repository interfaces and implementations.
    SettingsFragment
    Fragment for app settings and preferences.
    User
     
    UserDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for User entity.
    UserRepository
    Repository interface for User entity operations.
    UserRepositoryImpl
    Implementation of UserRepository providing user data operations.
